  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' centrally implies sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for grammar, clarity, concision, and flow without changing technical content.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should reflect appropriate uncertainty where claims could be read as absolute (e.g., robustness or 'deployment-ready' language).",
    "RX.2": "Cleanup must avoid strengthening claims about stability, feasibility, or deployment readiness beyond what the text supports.",
    "RX.3": "Work should stay strictly within wording cleanup and refrain from conceptual rewrites, reordering sections, or altering results.",
    "RX.4": "Language should not encourage unsafe deployment or misrepresent robustness/stability guarantees in safety-critical contexts.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain the original meaning and attributions so any revisions remain traceable to the provided text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' centrally implies sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for grammar, clarity, concision, and flow without changing technical content.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should reflect appropriate uncertainty where claims could be read as absolute (e.g., robustness or 'deployment-ready' language).
rationale.RX.2: Cleanup must avoid strengthening claims about stability, feasibility, or deployment readiness beyond what the text supports.
rationale.RX.3: Work should stay strictly within wording cleanup and refrain from conceptual rewrites, reordering sections, or altering results.
rationale.RX.4: Language should not encourage unsafe deployment or misrepresent robustness/stability guarantees in safety-critical contexts.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain the original meaning and attributions so any revisions remain traceable to the provided text.
